segments.text: A psalm of David, when he fled from his son Absalom.
O Lord, how many are my foes! Many are rising against me;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: many are saying of me, 'There is no help for him in God.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But you, O Lord, are a shield about me, my glory, and the lifter of my head.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I cried aloud to the Lord, and he answered me from his holy hill.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I lay down and slept; I woke again, for the Lord sustained me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not be afraid of many thousands of people who have set themselves against me all around.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arise, O Lord! Save me, O my God! For you strike all my enemies on the cheek; you break the teeth of the wicked.
segments.speaker: David
